_comment_target: FSDP smoke for legacy_render_variant=v3 (ActionRenderCrossAdapterV3, model_v3.py). 3-layer render encoder + 2-layer action encoder, LayerNorm on both, 2 TRADITIONAL pre-norm transformer blocks (residual cross-attn + residual FFN) where render tokens attend over actions, 2-layer projection ADDED to temb_base. Standard PyTorch init throughout (no zero-init, no small-init). 10 videos x 10 epochs x 17 frames on 4xGH200, ~10-15 min. Smoke goals: (1) plumbing runs end-to-end, (2) loss does NOT diverge (v2 went 1.66->2.45 in 3 epochs — v3 should descend or stay flat), (3) train/v3_block0_qkv_std DRIFTS from init (v2's failure was QKV welded at init), (4) val loss logs every epoch.
_num_frames_note: 17 frames matches the egowm baseline + the v2 runs. T_lat=5 post-patch frames x 30x54 spatial = 8100 tokens. Fast smoke.
_action_note: 8-d state (joint_position 7 + gripper 1) z-scored against train-split stats. At num_frames=17 the action K/V bank for the v3 cross-attn blocks is 17 tokens.
_cache_note: Distinct cache: key includes 10-vid CSV + has_actions + num_frames=17. The v2 10-vid cache (precompute_cache_10vids_v2_17f.pt) is data-identical so this could in principle reuse it, but a separate file avoids any confusion. First launch MISSES (~30 sec for 10 videos through the VAE).
_val_note: Same 10-scene held-out set used by the other v2/v3 configs. Val every epoch so the smoke surfaces val-pass bugs immediately.
